title: active_threat
description: An active threat reported near main entrance escalates to facility-wide lockdown.

timeline.title: Initial Report
timeline.description: Security receives call from lobby about suspicious individual displaying aggressive behavior.

timeline.title: Threat Confirmed
timeline.description: Security camera confirms individual has entered building with apparent weapon. Alert all personnel.

timeline.title: Lockdown Initiated
timeline.description: Activate facility-wide lockdown. All personnel shelter in place. Doors locked remotely.

timeline.title: Law Enforcement Notified
timeline.description: 911 called. Police en route, ETA 8 minutes. Maintain lockdown and account for all personnel.

timeline.title: Threat Movement
timeline.description: Subject moving toward administrative wing. Update all personnel on location. Do not engage.

timeline.title: Police Arrival
timeline.description: Law enforcement on-site. Maintain lockdown. Provide building schematics and camera access to police.

timeline.title: Threat Neutralized
timeline.description: Suspect in custody. Police conducting sweep. Prepare for all-clear and accountability checks.

node-1.title: Suspicious Individual Reported
node-1.situation: Security receives a report of a suspicious individual displaying aggressive behavior near the main lobby entrance.
node-1.question: What is your immediate action?

options.label: A
options.text: Alert all security personnel and dispatch to the lobby immediately.

options.label: B
options.text: Approach the individual yourself to assess the situation.

options.label: C
options.text: Wait for additional reports before taking action.

node-2.title: Threat Confirmed
node-2.situation: Security cameras confirm the individual has entered the building carrying an apparent weapon. Personnel are at risk.
node-2.question: How do you respond?

options.label: A
options.text: Initiate facility-wide lockdown and call 911 immediately.

options.label: B
options.text: Continue monitoring cameras before triggering a lockdown.

node-3.title: Lockdown Activated
node-3.situation: Facility is in lockdown. Personnel are sheltering in place. Police have been called with an ETA of 8 minutes.
node-3.question: What do you communicate to staff?

options.label: A
options.text: Instruct all personnel to stay in place, lock doors, and do not approach windows.

options.label: B
options.text: Tell personnel to evacuate the building immediately.

node-4.title: Police On Scene
node-4.situation: Law enforcement has arrived and is conducting a sweep of the building. The suspect is believed to be in the administrative wing.
node-4.question: How do you assist law enforcement?

options.label: A
options.text: Provide police with building schematics and access to security cameras.

options.label: B
options.text: Begin lifting the lockdown so staff can return to work.

node-5.title: Scenario Complete
node-5.situation: The suspect has been taken into custody. Police have given the all-clear after a full sweep. All staff are safe and accounted for.
node-5.question: Scenario complete. Well done!
